{{CargoRelic
|name=Anathema Scroll
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=Rent from [[Must-Not-Name]]
|description=Curse you! Curse you! Curse you! Curse you... Just keep reciting the curse, with certain movements, it's the most basic curse anyone can use. Easy, isn't it?
|fame=13
|art=16
|fth=29
|civ=17
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 4 Novice Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +1<br>Novice Scrolls Used: 120/120
|ss2=Per 4 Novice Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +2<br>Novice Scrolls Used: 120/120
|ss3=Per 4 Novice Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +3<br>Novice Scrolls Used: 120/120
}}

[[Category: Partner Relics]]
